body.title: CLOSED: Two-tab web UI — Comms + Control Station
body.result: Tab 1 comms (existing), Tab 2 control station with card grid; 6 tests — commit da2eee2
body.description:
The fallback web UI currently shows comms channel view + chat. Restructure into two tabs accessible from the same page:

Tab 1 — Comms: existing channel view + chat input. Queues MCP messages. Same as current fallback HTML.
Tab 2 — Control station: embeds /health (device status), IMAP bus traffic (recent messages), links to palace browser pages (/goals, /decisions, /questions). The rack dashboard.

Implementation: update _DASHBOARD_HTML / fallback HTML in server.py. Pure HTML/CSS tabs (no JS framework). Tab state via CSS :target or simple inline JS toggle.

**Affected files:** devices/web_server/server.py (_DASHBOARD_HTML constant and/or index fallback)
**Design rules:** no external JS dependencies; must work in any browser including mobile
**Scope boundary:** layout restructure only. No new API endpoints. Control station tab links to existing routes from T-web-palace-read.
**Test plan:** both tabs render without JS errors. /health link in Tab 2 resolves. Chat still works from Tab 1.
